Our Story

A safe, joyful place for little hearts to bloom.

Little Hearts Learning Daycare was created with one clear belief: children thrive when they feel safe, loved, encouraged, and understood. Our days blend structured learning, creative play, outdoor discovery, early literacy, and family-style care.

California Family Child Care — licensed upon approval
CPR & Pediatric First Aid Certified
Background checked caregiver
Low child-to-provider ratio for personalized care
Nutritious meals and snacks included
Structured play-based curriculum
💛
Nurturing CareEvery child feels seen, safe, and loved.
🌿
Nature-InspiredGarden, chalk, bubbles, and outdoor discovery.
🎨
Creative PlayArt, storytelling, sensory play, and imagination.
🤝
Family PartnershipOpen communication with parents.
📚
Early LiteracyStories and language spark curiosity.
Meet Mina
“Every parent deserves to focus on their day knowing their child is safe, loved, and growing.”

Mina's journey with children began in her home country of Indonesia, where she spent over a decade working with young learners in international schools and English language courses.

Her passion for early childhood education led her to open her own learning center — nurturing curious minds and building confident communicators from the ground up.

After moving to the United States, Mina brought that same warmth, dedication, and expertise with her. She founded Little Hearts Learning Daycare with one clear mission: to create a safe, joyful space where every child feels celebrated and every family feels at home.

🌎
10+ YearsExperience with young learners.
📖
EducatorFounder of her own learning course.
♡
MotherFamily-style care with patience.

Tuition & Fees

Simple, clear pricing.

Full-Time Care

$245/week

Monday–Friday during regular daycare hours.

Part-Time Care

$175/week

Part-time weekly care option. Please ask for available days and openings.

Registration Deposit

$120

Required to hold your child’s spot. Applied to the first week’s tuition.

Meals & Snacks

Included

Breakfast, lunch, and afternoon snack are included.

Weekend Care

Extra Charge

Available for an additional fee. Please ask for details.

Holiday Care

Ask Details

Available on select holidays for an additional fee with advance notice.

Late Pickup Fee: First 15 minutes is $25. After that, $10 for every additional 10 minutes.

A Day at Little Hearts

Our Daily Schedule

Every day is filled with love, learning, and laughter.

6:00–8:00Arrival, breakfast, and free play
8:00–10:00Circle time, stories, and learning activities
10:00–11:30Outdoor stations, garden, bubbles, chalk, and sensory play
11:30–12:30Lunch and cleanup
12:30–2:30Rest time and quiet activities
2:30–6:00Snack, creative play, outdoor time, and pickup
Questions Parents Ask

Frequently Asked Questions

Are meals included?

Yes. Breakfast, lunch, and afternoon snack are included.

Are weekends available?

Weekend care may be available for an additional fee. Please ask for details.

How do I hold a spot?

A $120 registration deposit holds your child’s spot and is applied to the first week’s tuition.

Parent Handbook

Our Parent Handbook includes policies, tuition information, health and safety procedures, holiday schedule, late pickup rules, and family expectations.
